blocks.selector:
html[data-theme="dark-clinical"],
html[data-theme="dark-academia"],
html[data-theme="dark-mode"],
html[data-theme="midnight-indigo"],
html[data-theme="deep-twilight"],
html[data-theme="evergreen-steel
blocks.comment: /* Dark palettes: stronger separation (flat navy + same accent reads as one blob) */

blocks.selector:
:where(
    a,
    button,
    input:not([type="hidden"]),
    select,
    textarea,
    summary,
    [role="button"],
    [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])
  ):focus-visible
